content.speakerText: The video file is 2GB—I can't upload it to the team drive. Could I send it via WeTransfer?
content.speakerTextCn: 视频文件有2GB，无法上传到团队网盘，能用WeTransfer发吗？
expectedAnswers: Yes, WeTransfer is fine—just make sure the link doesn't expire too soon.
Go ahead! Please set the link to expire in 7 days and notify me when you send it.
I'd prefer a lower-resolution version via email, but if you must use WeTransfer, please share the password too.
evaluationCriteria: 是否清晰接受或建议替代方案
是否包含具体操作建议（如过期时间、密码）
是否使用了专业、礼貌的语气，避免命令式表达
